description: minimal project with background, foreground, icon, path produces correct name/ansi/hex in dist JSON
steps: Create a minimal src/projects.json with one project: background 'GREEN_8', foreground 'GRAY_9', icon and path set
Create a minimal colors mock that defines COLOR_GREEN_8, COLOR_GREEN_8_HEXA, COLOR_GRAY_9, COLOR_GRAY_9_HEXA, COLOR_DARK_GREEN, COLOR_DARK_GREEN_HEXA
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.json contains background.name='GREEN_8', background.ansi=correct integer, background.hex=correct hex string
Assert dist/projects.json contains foreground.name='GRAY_9', foreground.ansi and foreground.hex

description: background with numeric suffix derives backgroundInactive by stripping suffix and prepending DARK_
steps: Create src/projects.json with a project whose background is 'GREEN_8'
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.json contains backgroundInactive.name='DARK_GREEN' with correct ansi and hex values

description: background without numeric suffix derives backgroundInactive by prepending DARK_
steps: Create src/projects.json with a project whose background is 'GREEN' (no numeric suffix)
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.json contains backgroundInactive.name='DARK_GREEN' with correct ansi and hex values

description: hideNameInPrompt true in src produces true in dist; absent in src produces false in dist
steps: Create src/projects.json with two projects: one with hideNameInPrompt:true, one without the key
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.json has hideNameInPrompt:true for the first project
Assert dist/projects.json has hideNameInPrompt:false for the second project

description: path without trailing slash in src is normalised with trailing slash in dist
steps: Create src/projects.json with a project whose path has no trailing slash
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.json contains the path with a trailing slash

description: dist/projects.zsh contains typeset -gA PROJECTS and dot-notation keys mirroring JSON paths
steps: Create a minimal src/projects.json with one project
Run src/projects-build
Assert dist/projects.zsh contains 'typeset -gA PROJECTS'
Assert dist/projects.zsh contains PROJECTS[projectname.background.name]
Assert dist/projects.zsh contains PROJECTS[projectname.background.ansi]
Assert dist/projects.zsh contains PROJECTS[projectname.background.hex]
Assert dist/projects.zsh contains PROJECTS[projectname.path]

description: src/projects.json is sorted alphabetically after the build runs
steps: Create src/projects.json with projects in non-alphabetical order (e.g. 'oroshi' before 'aberlaas')
Run src/projects-build
Assert src/projects.json now has 'aberlaas' before 'oroshi'
